====Pokémon====
=====On hand=====
{{anchor|Golisopod 2}}{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Guzma
|pkmn=Golisopod
|stage1=Wimpod
|type1=Bug
|type2=Water
|img=Guzma Golisopod Adventures.png
|epnum=PASM05
|epname=The Announcement and the Prize
|desc={{p|Golisopod}} is Guzma's first known Pokémon. It was first seen with its Trainer at the [[Iki Town]] festival. In the tournament, it was used to battle against Sun's [[Cent]]. Due to being a scavenger in its days as a {{p|Wimpod}}, Golisopod accidentally dirties Cent's coin with its claws, causing it to fly into a rage and defeat Golisopod. Golisopod was separated from Guzma after he was taken into an [[Ultra Wormhole]] by a {{p|Nihilego}}.

Golisopod's only known move is {{m|First Impression}}.}}

{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Guzma
|pkmn=Masquerain
|type1=Bug
|type2=Flying
|img=Guzma Masquerain Adventures.png
|epnum=PASM06
|epname=The Party Crasher and Guzma the Destroyer
|desc={{p|Masquerain}} is Guzma's second known Pokémon. It was first seen being used to battle against Sun's {{adv|Dollar}} at the [[Iki Town]] festival tournament and won, but was later defeated by Sun's [[Cent]].

Masquerain's known moves are {{m|Water Sport}} and {{m|Bubble}}.}}

=====Used=====
{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Guzma
|main=Solgaleo (Adventures)
|pkmn=Cosmog
|type1=Psychic
|img=Cosmog Adventures.png
|epnum=PASM18
|epname=Confusion and Monsters from Another World
|desc=Guzma received this {{p|Cosmog}} from the [[Aether Foundation]]. With it, Guzma opened [[Ultra Wormhole]]s in order to summon more [[Ultra Beast]]s to attack the Captains at [[Po Town]].}}

=====Summoned=====
{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Guzma
|pkmn=Celesteela (multiple)
|type1=Steel
|type2=Flying
|img=Celesteela Adventures.png
|cap=Guzma's Celesteela
|epnum=PASM17
|epname=A Raid and Po Town
|desc=Guzma summoned {{p|Celesteela}} with {{p|Cosmog}}'s power. With its power, Guzma was easily able to defeat the Captains that had invaded [[Po Town]]. Afterwards, it escaped Po Town and caused havoc on the rest of Ula'ula. Later, more Celesteela emerged from the [[Ultra Wormhole]] in Po Town. They and several other Ultra Beasts converged on [[Poni Island]], where they battled with {{adv|Moon}}, [[Gladion]], [[Hapu]], and [[Anabel]].

None of Celesteela's moves are known.}}

{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Guzma
|pkmn=Xurkitree (multiple)
|type1=Electric
|img=Xurkitree Adventures.png
|cap=Guzma's Xurkitree
|epnum=PASM09
|epname=True Identity and the Totem Pokémon of Brooklet Hill
|desc=Guzma summoned {{p|Xurkitree}} with {{p|Cosmog}}'s power. Despite being the one who summoned it, Guzma was caught in Xurkitree's attacks as well. Afterward, it escaped Po Town to cause havoc on the rest of Ula'ula. Later, more Xurkitree emerged from the [[Ultra Wormhole]] in Po Town. They and several other Ultra Beasts converged on [[Poni Island]], where they battled with {{adv|Moon}}, [[Gladion]], [[Hapu]], and [[Anabel]].

None of Xurkitree's moves are known.}}

{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Guzma
|pkmn=Nihilego (multiple)
|type1=Rock
|type2=Poison
|img=Nihilego Adventures.png
|cap=Guzma's Nihilego
|epnum=PASM19
|epname=Truth and the Mastermind Behind Team Skull
|desc=Guzma summoned {{p|Nihilego}} with {{p|Cosmog}}'s power. Guzma was captured by Nihilego, who proceeded to drag him into an [[Ultra Wormhole]]. Later, more Nihilego emerged from the [[Ultra Wormhole]] in Po Town. They and several other Ultra Beasts converged on [[Poni Island]], where they battled with {{adv|Moon}}, [[Gladion]], [[Hapu]], and [[Anabel]]. The one that captured Guzma was later caught by [[Lusamine]].

None of Nihilego's moves are known.}}

{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Guzma
|pkmn=Blacephalon (multiple)
|type1=Fire
|type2=Ghost
|img=Blacephalon Adventures.png
|cap=Guzma's Blacephalon
|epnum=PASM20
|epname=An Urgent Task and the Capture of an Ultra Beast
|desc=Guzma summoned {{p|Blacephalon}} with {{p|Cosmog}}'s power. It appeared from an [[Ultra Wormhole]] after the other Ultra Beasts had escaped from Po Town. There, it attacked {{adv|Sun}}, {{adv|Moon}}, and [[Anabel]] before being driven off by {{p|Tapu Bulu}}. Later, more Blacephalon emerged from the [[Ultra Wormhole]] in Po Town. They and several other Ultra Beasts converged on [[Poni Island]], where they battled with {{adv|Moon}}, [[Gladion]], [[Hapu]], and [[Anabel]].

One of the Blacephalon's known moves are {{m|Flame Burst}} and {{m|Mind Blown}}.}}
